summary: Mental health support chat app with custom local user login before chat, anonymous chat with private encryption (including client-to-client E2EE and encryption at rest/in transit), rule-based mood/burnout detection, and a therapist connection prompt (first session free).
architectural_notes: Login must precede chat feature access.
Authentication is custom username/password (not Internet Identity), with strict password complexity + rotation enforced and a local CAPTCHA challenge.
Encryption requirement includes both client-to-client E2EE and encryption for storage/transport using a simplified scheme (Signal-like intent, but simplified).
Mood/burnout detection is rule-based and hosted on-device/IC (no external AI API).

existing_features.title: Add a custom local username/password authentication system that must be completed before a user can access the Anonymous Chat experience.
Implement secure credential handling for local auth: secure storage, robust transmission, strict user policies including password complexity AND password rotation enforced simultaneously.
Add a simple local CAPTCHA-style challenge as an additional authentication layer during account creation and/or sign-in, implemented without third-party services.

Implement a simplified private encryption layer for anonymous chat such that messages are end-to-end encrypted between clients and also encrypted for storage/transport on the platform (store ciphertext, not plaintext).
Add an IC-hosted/on-device rule-based classifier that analyzes submitted chat text to identify mood and mental burnout signals, and generate a deterministic, rule-based supportive response.

After the system produces the supportive response to the submitted chat text, present a dedicated screen (or modal step) that offers to connect the user to a licensed therapist and states that the first session will be free if the user proceeds.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add custom local username/password login before chat, with secure storage/transmission, strict password complexity + rotation policies enforced, local CAPTCHA challenge, and additional authentication layers.
Implement private messaging encryption: simplified encryption layer plus client-to-client E2EE for anonymous chat, and encryption for storage/transport on the platform.
Add IC-hosted/on-device rule-based classifier to identify moods and mental burnout from submitted chat text.
After mood/burnout response, show a screen offering connection to a licensed therapist and indicating the first session is free if the user proceeds.
Extend the Motoko backend to support local user accounts and sessions suitable for gating access to chat/data-entry APIs, while keeping to the single-actor architecture.

projectName: Add local username/password auth gate, private encrypted chat, mood/burnout detection, and therapist prompt flow
